UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the King Solomon's emotional intelligence, his role as a mediator, and the balance between his sea throne, cups, and scepter.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the ships or waves as they may distract from the central focus of King Solomon.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Cups card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, Orchestral, Strings, Harp, Brass, Majestic, Triumphant, Instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the drunken stupor and disarray, suggesting a loss of control or direction in emotional matters.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the captain's chaotic appearance as a call to action, instead focusing on the potential for introspection and self-correction.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Cups card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic ambient orchestral, strings, harp, reversed, introspective, minor, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the King of Cups card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the balance between power and mercy, the calm control Prospero exudes in his throne amidst the tempest.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the turbulence of the waves or the books, instead focus on the King's character and the peace he brings.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the King of Cups card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, trumpet, majestic, triumphant, stable, hopeful, instrumental
